audit_items.proof_trace: Every allocation in bitops.c is matched by exactly one deallocation on each code path: `src`/`len`/`objects` in `bitopCommand` are freed after all dereferences complete (success path L750-752; error path L644-646 with loop bounded to `i < j` covering only initialized entries); `res` (SDS) is transferred via `createObject` and not touched afterwards; `ops` in `bitfieldCommand` is freed once per exit path with sequential `zfree(ops); return` guards. All other functions in the file contain no dynamic allocation or deallocation.
